## Meeting Purpose

[Sync between Marcel Santilli (GrowthX Labs) and Dignory Carmona (growthx.ai) to establish working preferences and discuss ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel prefers calendar management 2-3 weeks ahead, with clustered meetings (esp. Wednesdays) and protected morning blocks](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Implementing a priority system (1-3) for meetings and contacts, utilizing Atio for contact management](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [Weekly Tuesday morning syncs established (6:00 AM during Marcel's commute)](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Upcoming Series A announcement (likely Monday) will require calendar flexibility for prospect meetings](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)

## Topics

### Calendar Management Preferences

  - [Aim for 2-3 weeks ahead on calendar planning](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Cluster meetings, especially on Wednesdays, to create larger blocks of focus time](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [Protect morning blocks, especially early mornings, for heads-down work](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Afternoons (1-3:30 PM) are better for scheduling meetings](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Tuesdays are office days, generally kept blocked for collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Flexibility needed for high-priority contacts (e.g., Sil from Augment Code)](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)

### Priority System Implementation

  - [Introduce a 1-3 priority system for meetings and contacts](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [Utilize Atio for contact management, including priority tagging](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Weekly syncs to review and assign priorities](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Color-coding in Motion Calendar for visual priority indication](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)

### Recurring Sync Schedule

  - [Established weekly Tuesday morning syncs at 6:00 AM during Marcel's commute](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Will use WhatsApp for these calls](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)

### Upcoming Series A Announcement

  - [Likely happening on Monday (26th)](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Will require increased calendar flexibility for prospect meetings](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Expect influx of messages, especially from VCs](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)

### VC Meeting Management

  - [Cluster VC networking meetings into a single day (mid-June)](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [Differentiate responses based on VC firm size and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Standard responses: "reconnect in a few months" vs. "connect in a month"](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)

### Miscellaneous Projects

  - [Launch party outreach list created (340 contacts)](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Some confusion with LinkedIn outreach messages being interpreted as recruitment](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [Condo account payment confirmation](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to review and approve contact list for launch party outreach](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
  - [Dignory to create standard response templates for different types of incoming messages (recruiting, VCs, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Set up a VC networking day in mid-June](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [Marcel to ensure Dignory has proper access to Zoom for meeting scheduling](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [Marcel to add payment card for Condo account](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
  - [Prepare for increased incoming messages following Series A announcement](https://fathom.video/share/sovTx6HPuxtm1QZWysGuTsyzsmMUyNNT?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
